title: UNIQUE Constraint is not enforced
poc: CREATE TABLE "test"."test2" ("ref" INT REFERENCES "test"."test" , CONSTRAINT "unique" UNIQUE ("ref") );
create table test (id int primary key);
create table test2 (id int unique references sys.test);

INSERT INTO: UNIQUE constraint 'test2.test2_id_unique' violated
 insert into test2 values (2);
INSERT INTO: FOREIGN KEY constraint 'test2.test2_id_fkey' violated;
key_bug_features: UNIQUE constraint violation on referenced table insertions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "test"."main_table" ("id" INT PRIMARY KEY, "value" VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE "test"."ref_table" ("ref_id" INT REFERENCES "test"."main_table", CONSTRAINT "unique_ref" UNIQUE ("ref_id"));
